ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Background has color or is transparent

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Line sloppiness of the shape fill pattern
ast.target: 形状填充图案的线条抖动程度

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to simulate pressure based on velocity.
ast.target: 是否根据速度模拟压力。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The distance to taper. If set to true, the taper will be the total length of the stroke.
ast.target: 渐细的距离。如果设置为 true，渐细长度将为笔画的总长度。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Lock pages on canvas after import
ast.target: 导入后锁定画布上的页面

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: filename of css file in vault

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Excalidraw sidepanel is empty. Run a panel-enabled Excalidraw script to add a panel.
ast.target: Excalidraw 侧边面板为空。请运行一个支持面板的 Excalidraw 脚本来添加面板。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: PolyBool: Warning: Zero-length segment detected; your epsilon is probably too small or too large
ast.target: PolyBool：警告：检测到零长度线段；您的 epsilon 值可能太小或太大

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Undefined CHARARRAY encountered and treated as an empty string. This is probably caused by a missing glyph name.
ast.target: 遇到未定义的 CHARARRAY 并将其视为空字符串。这可能是由于缺少字形名称造成的。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Font.toBuffer is deprecated. Use Font.toArrayBuffer instead.
ast.target: Font.toBuffer 已弃用。请改用 Font.toArrayBuffer。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Font file could not be downloaded. Try using a different browser.
ast.target: 无法下载字体文件。请尝试使用其他浏览器。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Only the first kern subtable is supported.
ast.target: 仅支持第一个字距调整子表。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Excalidraw Image Cache is Initialized - You may now retry opening your damaged drawing.
ast.target: Excalidraw 图像缓存已初始化 - 您现在可以重试打开损坏的绘图。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Mermaid images are only supported in Obsidian 1.4.14 and above. Please update Obsidian to see the mermaid images in this drawing. Obsidian mobile 1.4.14 currently only avaiable to Obsidian insiders
ast.target: Mermaid 图像仅支持 Obsidian 1.4.14 及更高版本。请更新 Obsidian 以查看此绘图中的 Mermaid 图像。Obsidian 移动版 1.4.14 目前仅对 Obsidian 内部测试人员开放

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error opening the Excalidraw Script Store page. Please double check that you can access the website. I've logged the link in developer console (press CTRL+SHIFT+i)
ast.target: 打开 Excalidraw 脚本商店页面时出错。请仔细检查您是否可以访问该网站。我已在开发者控制台中记录了链接（按 CTRL+SHIFT+i）

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 无法打开 ScriptEngine 仓库

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Taskbone OCR is not enabled. Please go to plugins settings to enable it.
ast.target: Taskbone OCR 未启用。请前往插件设置以启用它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Sorry, cannot edit rotated markdown documents
ast.target: 抱歉，无法编辑旋转的 Markdown 文档

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: AI API key is not set. Please set it in plugin settings.
ast.target: AI API 密钥未设置。请在插件设置中进行设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: on drop hook error. See console log for details
ast.target: 放置钩子错误。详情请查看控制台日志

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Not imported to Vault. Embedded with local URI
ast.target: 未导入到 Vault。已使用本地 URI 嵌入

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unknown error, save is taking too long
ast.target: 未知错误，保存耗时过长

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Selected element already has a link. Inserting link as text.
ast.target: 所选元素已包含链接。将链接作为文本插入。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Attempting to download image from URL. This may take a long while. The operation will time out after max 1 minute
ast.target: 正在尝试从 URL 下载图像。这可能需要很长时间。操作将在最多 1 分钟后超时

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Image successfully converted to local file
ast.target: 图像已成功转换为本地文件

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Multiple frames are not supported for image cropping. Discarding frames from mask.
ast.target: 图像裁剪不支持多帧。已从蒙版中丢弃帧。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: File not found. NewExcalidraw Drawing is taking too long to create. Please try again.
ast.target: 未找到文件。NewExcalidraw 绘图创建耗时过长。请重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error loading the Excalidraw package. Some features may not work correctly.
ast.target: 加载 Excalidraw 包时出错。某些功能可能无法正常工作。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Aborting OCR because there are no image or freedraw elements on the canvas.
ast.target: 中止 OCR，因为画布上没有图像或自由绘制元素。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The drawing has already been processed, you will find the result in the frontmatter in markdown view mode. If you ran the command from the Obsidian Panel in Excalidraw then you can CTRL(CMD)+click the command to force the rescaning.
ast.target: 该绘图已被处理，您将在 Markdown 视图模式下的 frontmatter 中找到结果。如果您是从 Excalidraw 中的 Obsidian 面板运行命令，则可以 CTRL(CMD)+单击该命令以强制重新扫描。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Something went wrong while processing your request. Please check developer console for more information
ast.target: 处理您的请求时出现问题。请检查开发者控制台以获取更多信息

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The compressed string is corrupted. Unable to decompress data.
ast.target: 压缩字符串已损坏。无法解压数据。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Utility function that provides help about ExcalidrawAutomate functions and properties. I recommend calling this function from Developer Console to print out help to the console.
ast.target: 提供有关 ExcalidrawAutomate 函数和属性的帮助信息的实用函数。我建议从开发者控制台调用此函数，以将帮助信息打印到控制台。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Returns true if the file is an Excalidraw Mask file. If file is not provided, the function will use ea.targetView.file
ast.target: 如果文件是 Excalidraw 蒙版文件，则返回 true。如果未提供文件，该函数将使用 ea.targetView.file

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A modified version of the Obsidian.Modal class that allows the modal to be dragged around the screen and that does not dim the background.
ast.target: Obsidian.Modal 类的修改版本，允许模态框在屏幕上拖动，并且不会使背景变暗。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The {} dictionary object, contains the ExcalidrawElements currently edited in Automate indexed by el.id
ast.target: {} 字典对象，包含当前在 Automate 中编辑的 ExcalidrawElements，按 el.id 索引

ast.name: desc
ast.source: the images files including DataURL, indexed by fileId
ast.target: 图像文件，包括 DataURL，按 fileId 索引

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Rotation of the object in radian

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 0: 建筑师\n1: 艺术家\n2: 卡通画家

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 100: 完全不透明\n0: 完全透明

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
set to null for 'sharp', else the stroke will be 'round'
type: 1==LEGACY,
2==PROPORTIONAL RADIUS,
3==ADAPTIVE RADIUS, value: adaptive factor defaults to 32
ast.target:
设置为 null 表示 '尖锐'，否则笔画将为 '圆角'
类型: 1==旧版,
2==比例半径,
3==自适应半径, 值: 自适应因子默认为 32

ast.name: desc
ast.source: 1: Virgil, 2:Helvetica, 3:Cascadia, 4:Local Font, 5: Excalifont, 6: Nunito, 7: Lilita One, 8: Comic Shanns, 9: Liberation Sans
ast.target: 1: Virgil, 2: Helvetica, 3: Cascadia, 4: 本地字体, 5: Excalifont, 6: Nunito, 7: Lilita One, 8: Comic Shanns, 9: Liberation Sans

ast.name: desc
ast.source: For future use, has no effect currently; 'top' | 'bottom' | 'middle'

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Set ea.style.roundness. 0: is the legacy value, 3: is the current default value, null is sharp
ast.target: 设置 ea.style.roundness。0: 是旧版值，3: 是当前默认值，null 表示尖锐

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Copies current elements using template to clipboard, ready to be pasted into an excalidraw canvas
ast.target: 使用模板将当前元素复制到剪贴板，准备粘贴到 excalidraw 画布中

ast.name: desc
ast.source: returns the elements and appState from a file, if the file is not an excalidraw file, it will return null
ast.target: 从文件返回元素和 appState，如果文件不是 excalidraw 文件，则返回 null

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Get all elements from ExcalidrawAutomate elementsDict
ast.target: 从 ExcalidrawAutomate elementsDict 获取所有元素

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Get single element from ExcalidrawAutomate elementsDict
ast.target: 从 ExcalidrawAutomate elementsDict 获取单个元素

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Use ExcalidrawAutomate.getExportSettings(boolean,boolean) to create an ExportSettings object.
Use ExcalidrawAutomate.getEmbeddedFilesLoader(boolean?) to create an EmbeddedFilesLoader object.
ast.target: 使用 ExcalidrawAutomate.getExportSettings(boolean,boolean) 创建 ExportSettings 对象。\n使用 ExcalidrawAutomate.getEmbeddedFilesLoader(boolean?) 创建 EmbeddedFilesLoader 对象。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The same as createPNG but returns a base64 encoded string instead of a file.
ast.target: 与 createPNG 相同，但返回 base64 编码的字符串而不是文件。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Refreshes the size of the text element. Intended to be used when you copyViewElementsToEAforEditing() and then change the text in a text element and want to update the size of the text element to fit the modifid contents.
ast.target: 刷新文本元素的大小。旨在当您 copyViewElementsToEAforEditing() 然后更改文本元素中的文本并希望更新文本元素大小以适应修改后的内容时使用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: This is an async function, you need to avait the results. Adds a LaTex element to the drawing. The tex string is the LaTex code. The function returns the id of the created element.
ast.target: 这是一个异步函数，您需要等待结果。向绘图添加一个 LaTex 元素。tex 字符串是 LaTex 代码。该函数返回所创建元素的 id。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: returns the base64 dataURL of the LaTeX equation rendered as an SVG. tex is the LaTeX equation string
ast.target: 返回渲染为 SVG 的 LaTeX 方程的 base64 dataURL。tex 是 LaTeX 方程字符串

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Adds a text label to a line or arrow. Currently only works with a simple straight 2-point (start & end) line
ast.target: 向线条或箭头添加文本标签。目前仅适用于简单的两点（起点和终点）直线

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 仅清除 elementsDict 和 imagesDict

ast.name: desc
ast.source: clear() + reset all style values to default
ast.target: clear() + 将所有样式值重置为默认值

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Returns true if MD file is an Excalidraw file
ast.target: 如果 MD 文件是 Excalidraw 文件，则返回 true

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 当前编辑的 Obsidian 视图

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Get the selected element in the view, if more are selected, get the first
ast.target: 获取视图中选定的元素，如果选中多个，则获取第一个

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If a frame is selected this function will return the frame and all its elements unless includeFrameChildren is set to false
ast.target: 如果选中了一个框架，此函数将返回该框架及其所有元素，除非 includeFrameChildren 设置为 false

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Returns the TFile file handle for the image element
ast.target: 返回图像元素的 TFile 文件句柄

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Copies elements from view to elementsDict for editing. If copyImages is true, then relevant entries from scene.files will also be copied. This is required if you want to generate a PNG for a subset of the elements in the drawing (e.g. for AI generation)
ast.target: 将元素从视图复制到 elementsDict 进行编辑。如果 copyImages 为 true，则 scene.files 中的相关条目也将被复制。如果您想为绘图中的元素子集生成 PNG（例如用于 AI 生成），则需要此操作

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Connect an object to the selected element in the view
See tooltip for connectObjects for details
ast.target: 将对象连接到视图中选定的元素\n详情请参阅 connectObjects 的工具提示

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Markdown renderer will drop a copy of the most recent SVG here for debugging purposes
ast.target: Markdown 渲染器将在此处放置最新 SVG 的副本，用于调试目的

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Utility function to generate EmbeddedFilesLoader object
ast.target: 用于生成 EmbeddedFilesLoader 对象的实用函数

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Filter the elements and returns only those within the specific area.
ast.target: 筛选元素并仅返回特定区域内的元素。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Gets the bounding box of elements. The bounding box is the box encapsulating all of the elements completely.
ast.target: 获取元素的边界框。边界框是完全包围所有元素的框。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Elements grouped by the highest level groups
ast.target: 按最高层级分组的元素

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Gets the largest element from a group. useful when a text element is grouped with a box, and you want to connect an arrow to the box
ast.target: 从组中获取最大的元素。当文本元素与框分组，且您希望将箭头连接到框时非常有用

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
If gap is given, the element is inflated by this value.
Returns 2 or 0 intersection points between line going through `a` and `b` and the `element`, in ascending order of distance from `a`.
ast.target: 如果提供了间隙值，则元素会按此值膨胀。\n返回通过 `a` 和 `b` 的直线与 `element` 之间的 2 个或 0 个交点，按与 `a` 的距离升序排列。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Gets the groupId for the group that contains all the elements, or null if such a group does not exist
ast.target: 获取包含所有元素的组的 groupId，如果不存在这样的组则返回 null

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Gets all the elements from elements[] that share one or more groupIds with element.
If includeFrameElements is true, then if the frame is part of the group all the elements that are in the frame will also be included in the result set
ast.target:
从 elements[] 中获取所有与 element 共享一个或多个 groupId 的元素。
如果 includeFrameElements 为 true，且框架是组的一部分，则框架内的所有元素也将包含在结果集中

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Gets all the elements from elements[] that are inside the frameElement. If shouldIncludeFrame is true, the frameElement will also be included in the result.
ast.target: 从 elements[] 中获取所有位于 frameElement 内部的元素。如果 shouldIncludeFrame 为 true，frameElement 也将包含在结果中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Open a file in a new workspaceleaf or reuse an existing adjacent leaf depending on Excalidraw Plugin Settings
ast.target: 在新的工作区叶中打开文件，或根据 Excalidraw 插件设置复用现有的相邻叶

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Measures text size based on current style settings
ast.target: 基于当前样式设置测量文本大小

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Returns the size of the image element at 100% (i.e. the original size) or undefined if the data URL is not available.
If shouldWaitForImage is true, the function will wait for the view to load the image before returning the size.
This is an async function, you need to await the result.
ast.target: 返回图像元素在 100% 时的尺寸（即原始尺寸），如果数据 URL 不可用则返回 undefined。\n如果 shouldWaitForImage 为 true，函数将等待视图加载图像后再返回尺寸。\n这是一个异步函数，您需要 await 其结果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Returns true if plugin version is >= than required
recommended use:
<code>if(!ea.verifyMinimumPluginVersion || !ea.verifyMinimumPluginVersion("1.5.20")) {new Notice("message");return;}<code>
ast.target: 如果插件版本 >= 所需版本则返回 true\n推荐用法：\n<code>if(!ea.verifyMinimumPluginVersion || !ea.verifyMinimumPluginVersion(\"1.5.20\")) {new Notice(\"message\");return;}<code>

ast.name: desc
ast.source: You can supply a list of Excalidraw Elements or the string IDs of those elements. The elements provided will be set as selected in the targetView.
ast.target: 您可以提供 Excalidraw 元素列表或这些元素的字符串 ID。提供的元素将在 targetView 中设置为选中状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Returns an 8 character long random id
ast.target: 返回一个 8 字符长的随机 ID

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Returns a clone of the element with a new element id
ast.target: 返回具有新元素 ID 的元素克隆体

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Clones an array of Excalidraw elements or a clipboard string, ensuring that relationships (containers, bound elements, groups, bindings) are correctly remapped to the newly generated IDs.
ast.target: 克隆 Excalidraw 元素数组或剪贴板字符串，确保关系（容器、绑定元素、组、绑定）被正确重新映射到新生成的 ID。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Moves the element to a specific position in the z-index
ast.target: 将元素移动到 z-index 中的特定位置

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Converts a HEX color to an RGB number array. #FF0000 to [255,0,0]
ast.target: 将 HEX 颜色转换为 RGB 数字数组。#FF0000 转换为 [255,0,0]

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Converts an RGB number array to a HEX string. [255,0,0] to #FF0000
ast.target: 将 RGB 数字数组转换为 HEX 字符串。[255,0,0] 转换为 #FF0000

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Converts an HSL number array to an RGB number array. [0,100,50] to [255,0,0]
ast.target: 将 HSL 数字数组转换为 RGB 数字数组。[0,100,50] 转换为 [255,0,0]

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Converts an RGB number array to an HSL number array. [255,0,0] to [0,100,50]
ast.target: 将 RGB 数字数组转换为 HSL 数字数组。[255,0,0] 转换为 [0,100,50]

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Converts a CSS color name to its HEX color equivalent. 'White' to #FFFFFF
ast.target: 将 CSS 颜色名称转换为其对应的 HEX 颜色。'White' 转换为 #FFFFFF

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Returns the current view's palette for canvas background, element background, or element stroke colors. Falls back to the default palette when no view is loaded or the palette is unavailable.
ast.target: 返回当前视图的调色板，用于画布背景、元素背景或元素描边颜色。当没有加载视图或调色板不可用时，回退到默认调色板。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Returns a list of files in the template folder. If the Excalidraw Template is set as a single file, it returns a single element in the list. If no template is set, it returns null.
ast.target: 返回模板文件夹中的文件列表。如果 Excalidraw 模板设置为单个文件，则返回列表中的单个元素。如果未设置模板，则返回 null。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Retruns the embedded images in the scene recursively. If excalidrawFile is not provided, the function will use ea.targetView.file
ast.target: 递归返回场景中嵌入的图像。如果未提供 excalidrawFile，函数将使用 ea.targetView.file

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Returns a new instance of ExcalidrawAutomate.
ast.target: 返回 ExcalidrawAutomate 的新实例。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: @returns the last recorded pointer position on the Excalidraw canvas
ast.target: @returns Excalidraw 画布上最后记录的指针位置

ast.name: desc
ast.source: @returns the center position of the current view in Excalidraw coordinates
ast.target: @returns 当前视图在 Excalidraw 坐标中的中心位置

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Returns the WorkspaceLeaf hosting the Excalidraw sidepanel view, or null if the sidepanel is not present.
ast.target: 返回托管 Excalidraw 侧边栏视图的工作区叶，如果侧边栏不存在则返回 null。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Toggles the Excalidraw sidepanel visibility when the sidepanel is hosted in the left or right workspace split. If the sidepanel is not attached to a left/right sidebar, no action is taken.
ast.target: 当侧边栏托管在左侧或右侧工作区分区时，切换 Excalidraw 侧边栏的可见性。如果侧边栏未附加到左侧/右侧边栏，则不执行任何操作。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Pins the active script's sidepanel tab so it persists across Obsidian restarts and returns it.
ast.target: 固定活动脚本的侧边栏选项卡，使其在 Obsidian 重启后保持不变，并返回该选项卡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Attaches an inline [[link]] suggester to an input. Optionally align width to a wrapper element. Returns a KeyBlocker so host scripts can skip their own keydown handlers while the suggester is active via isBlockingKeys(); call close() on the returned suggester to detach.
ast.target: 将内联 [[链接]] 建议器附加到输入框。可选择将宽度与包装元素对齐。返回一个 KeyBlocker，以便宿主脚本在建议器活动期间可以通过 isBlockingKeys() 跳过自己的 keydown 处理程序；对返回的建议器调用 close() 以解除附加。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Parses raw text through targetView.excalidrawData using the same parsing pipeline as ExcalidrawData (including transclusion resolution, link brackets, and link/url prefixes from frontmatter). Works only when ea.targetView is set and loaded.
ast.target: 通过 targetView.excalidrawData 解析原始文本，使用与 ExcalidrawData 相同的解析管道（包括转置解析、链接括号以及来自 frontmatter 的链接/URL 前缀）。仅在 ea.targetView 已设置并加载时有效。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Checks if the folder exists, if not, creates it.
ast.target: 检查文件夹是否存在，如果不存在则创建它。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Checks if the filepath already exists, if so, returns a new filepath with a number appended to the filename else returns the filepath as provided.
ast.target: 检查文件路径是否已存在，如果存在，则返回在文件名后附加数字的新文件路径，否则返回提供的文件路径。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
High-level wrapper for multimodal image-analysis requests.
Supply an image in request.image or in message parts and optionally add text, instruction, or messages.
The configured text model must have multimodal support enabled.
ast.target:
用于多模态图像分析请求的高级包装器。
在 request.image 或消息部分中提供图像，并可选择添加 text、instruction 或 messages。
配置的文本模型必须启用多模态支持。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Applies a prompt-based transform to an input image using the configured image model.
Requires request.image. This is intended for providers/models that support image plus prompt edits without a mask.
ast.target:
使用配置的图像模型对输入图像应用基于提示的转换。
需要 request.image。这适用于支持图像加提示编辑（无需遮罩）的提供商/模型。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Applies a mask-based edit to an input image using the configured image model.
Requires both request.image and request.imageGenerationProperties.mask.
ast.target:
使用配置的图像模型对输入图像应用基于遮罩的编辑。
同时需要 request.image 和 request.imageGenerationProperties.mask。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Opens a modal dialog showing per-model AI token usage for the current session.
The dialog includes a 'Copy as Markdown' button so the table can be pasted elsewhere.
ast.target:
打开一个模态对话框，显示当前会话中每个模型的 AI 令牌使用情况。
该对话框包含一个“复制为 Markdown”按钮，以便将表格粘贴到其他地方。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Returns a compact label string summarising total session token usage.
Format: "AI Usage: 355k/23k" (input tokens / output tokens).
Appends image generation count when present, e.g. "AI Usage: 355k/23k + 3 imgs".
ast.target: 返回一个紧凑的标签字符串，总结总会话令牌使用情况。\n格式：\"AI Usage: 355k/23k\"（输入令牌 / 输出令牌）。\n当存在图像生成时，会附加图像生成计数，例如 \"AI Usage: 355k/23k + 3 imgs\"。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Grabs the codeblock content from the supplied markdown string. Returns an array of dictionaries with the codeblock content and type
ast.target: 从提供的 markdown 字符串中获取代码块内容。返回一个字典数组，包含代码块内容和类型

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Converts a string to a DataURL.

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Sets Excalidraw in the targetView to view-mode
ast.target: 将 targetView 中的 Excalidraw 设置为查看模式

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Splits a file path into its components.
ast.target: 将文件路径拆分为其组成部分。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Zoom tarteView to fit elements provided as input. elements === [] will zoom to fit the entire scene. SelectElements toggles whether the elements should be in a selected state at the end of the operation.
ast.target: 缩放 targetView 以适应作为输入提供的元素。elements === [] 将缩放以适应整个场景。SelectElements 切换操作结束时元素是否应处于选中状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Compresses String to a Base64 string using LZString
ast.target: 使用 LZString 将字符串压缩为 Base64 字符串

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Decompresses a base 64 compressed string using LZString
ast.target: 使用 LZString 解压缩 base 64 压缩的字符串

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Opens a suggester. Displays the displayItems and returns the corresponding item from items[] You need to await the result of suggester. If the user cancels (ESC), suggester will return undefined Hint and instructions are optional interface Instruction {command: string;purpose: string;}
ast.target: 打开一个建议器。显示 displayItems 并返回 items[] 中对应的项目 您需要 await suggester 的结果。 如果用户取消（ESC），suggester 将返回 undefined 提示和说明是可选的 interface Instruction {command: string;purpose: string;}

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The TFile of the currently running script
ast.target: 当前正在运行的脚本的 TFile

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Denotes an excalidraw file. If key is not present, the file will not be recognized as an Excalidraw file. Valid values are 'parsed' and 'raw'
ast.target: 表示一个 excalidraw 文件。如果此键不存在，该文件将不会被识别为 Excalidraw 文件。有效值为 'parsed' 和 'raw'

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Set custom prefix to denote text element containing a valid internal link. Set to empty string if you do not want to show a prefix
ast.target: 设置自定义前缀以标识包含有效内部链接的文本元素。如果不想显示前缀，请设置为空字符串

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Set custom prefix to denote text element containing a valid external link. Set to empty string if you do not want to show a prefix
ast.target: 设置自定义前缀以标识包含有效外部链接的文本元素。如果不想显示前缀，请设置为空字符串

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Set to true, if you want to display [[square brackets]] around the links in Text Elements
ast.target: 设置为 true，如果您希望在文本元素中的链接周围显示 [[方括号]]

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Specifies how Excalidraw should open by default. Valid values are: view|zen
ast.target: 指定 Excalidraw 默认应如何打开。有效值为：view|zen

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The opacity of the blue link button in the top right of the element overriding the respective setting in plugin settings. Valid values are between 0 and 1, where 0 means the button is transparent.
ast.target: 元素右上角蓝色链接按钮的透明度，覆盖插件设置中的相应设置。有效值在 0 到 1 之间，其中 0 表示按钮完全透明。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The value of this field will be executed as javascript code using the Script Engine environment. Use this to initiate custom actions or logic when loading your drawing.
ast.target: 此字段的值将使用脚本引擎环境作为 JavaScript 代码执行。使用此功能可在加载绘图时启动自定义操作或逻辑。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: This key applies to Markdown Embeds. You can control the appearance of the embedded markdown file on a file by file bases by adding the this frontmatter key to your markdown document. Valid values are: Virgil|Cascadia|font_file_name.extension
ast.target: 此键适用于 Markdown 嵌入。您可以通过将此前置键添加到您的 Markdown 文档中，按文件控制嵌入的 Markdown 文件的外观。有效值为：Virgil|Cascadia|字体文件名.扩展名

ast.name: desc
ast.source: This key applies to Markdown Embeds. You can control the appearance of the embedded markdown file on a file by file bases by adding the this frontmatter key to your markdown document. Valid values are: css-color-name|#HEXcolor|any-other-html-standard-format
ast.target: 此键适用于 Markdown 嵌入。您可以通过将此前置键添加到您的 Markdown 文档中，按文件控制嵌入的 Markdown 文件的外观。有效值为：css颜色名称|#十六进制颜色|任何其他HTML标准格式

ast.name: desc
ast.source: This key applies to Markdown Embeds. You can control the appearance of the embedded markdown file on a file by file bases by adding the this front matter keys to your markdown document. Valid values are: "css-filename|css snippet"
ast.target: 此键适用于 Markdown 嵌入。您可以通过将此前置键添加到您的 Markdown 文档中，按文件控制嵌入的 Markdown 文件的外观。有效值为：\"css文件名|css代码片段\"

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If this key is present it will override the default excalidraw embed and export setting. true == Transparent / false == with background
ast.target: 如果存在此键，它将覆盖默认的 excalidraw 嵌入和导出设置。true == 透明 / false == 带背景

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If this key is present it will override the default excalidraw embed and export setting. true == Dark mode / false == light mode
ast.target: 如果存在此键，它将覆盖默认的 excalidraw 嵌入和导出设置。true == 深色模式 / false == 浅色模式

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If this key is present it will override the default excalidraw embed and export setting. This only affects both SVG and PNG export. Specify the export padding for the image.
ast.target: 如果存在此键，它将覆盖默认的 excalidraw 嵌入和导出设置。这仅影响 SVG 和 PNG 导出。指定图像的导出边距。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If this key is present it will override the default excalidraw embed and export setting. This only affects export to PNG. Specify the export scale for the image. The typical range is between 0.5 and 5, but you can experiment with other values as well.
ast.target: 如果存在此键，它将覆盖默认的 excalidraw 嵌入和导出设置。这仅影响导出为 PNG。指定图像的导出比例。典型范围在 0.5 到 5 之间，但您也可以尝试其他值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If this key is present it will override the default excalidraw embed and export setting.
ast.target: 如果存在此键，它将覆盖默认的 excalidraw 嵌入和导出设置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default value (if not set) is true, if set to false internal links will not be exported to SVG images and PDFs.
ast.target: 默认值（如果未设置）为 true，如果设置为 false，内部链接将不会导出到 SVG 图像和 PDF 中。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If this key is present the file will be opened as a markdown file in the editor
ast.target: 如果存在此键，该文件将在编辑器中作为 Markdown 文件打开

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
If this key is present, when embedding the ![[image]] into a markdown document, it will be embedded as markdown, not as an image.
If however you embed ![[image#^as-image]], i.e. you reference the 'as-image' block, then the image will be embedded as an image.
ast.target: 如果存在此键，当将 ![[image]] 嵌入到 Markdown 文档中时，它将作为 Markdown 嵌入，而不是作为图像。\n但是，如果您嵌入 ![[image#^as-image]]，即引用 'as-image' 块，则图像将作为图像嵌入。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Override autoexport settings for this file. Valid values are
none
both
png
svg
ast.target:
覆盖此文件的自动导出设置。有效值为
none
both
png
svg

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Override embeddable's theme plugin-settings for this file. 'auto' will match the Excalidraw theme, 'default' will match the Obsidian theme. Valid values are
dark
light
auto
default
ast.target:
覆盖此文件的可嵌入主题插件设置。'auto' 将匹配 Excalidraw 主题，'default' 将匹配 Obsidian 主题。有效值为
dark
light
auto
default

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If this key is present the drawing will be handled as a mask to crop an image.
ast.target: 如果存在此键，该绘图将被视为裁剪图像的蒙版。

ast.name: error
ast.source: new drawing not recognized as an excalidraw file
ast.target: 新绘图未被识别为 excalidraw 文件

ast.name: message
ast.source: Unexpected block-seq-ind on same line with key
ast.target: 同一行上键的意外 block-seq-ind

ast.name: message
ast.source: targetView not set, or no longer active. Use setView before calling this function
ast.target: targetView 未设置或不再活动。请在调用此函数之前使用 setView

ast.name: message
ast.source: this function is not available on Obsidian Mobile
ast.target: 此函数在 Obsidian 移动端上不可用

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tapering options for the start of the line.
ast.target: 线条起始处的锥形选项。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Tapering options for the end of the line.
ast.target: 线条结束处的锥形选项。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 关于 Obsidian Publish 支持的视频
